events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a staged overcurrent device selection and coordination package for a commercial electrical project. The parts match the referenced sheet, are clean, intact, and properly sized. Reference materials on hand include NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, and 110.14(C).

Since everything is staged and matches the plans, and no defects are flagged, this should be a pass with low risk. The work is staged, so percent_complete is 0. No component conditions apply. No specific numeric value is asked for. No audio/video elements. No workable activities specified.
